text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, we were so close! Just a little longer, and Taiki would've got
the stone!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm just glad you're all safe. I'm sorry. All I did was panic. I dread
to think what would've happened if you weren't there...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gah! What?! I-I'm being swept away!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh no?! Oh no! Oh no!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: If she's there now, then with how fast the river's flowing... Got it!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I was the only one there who knew what to expect, and yet... I failed
to explain things properly. I'm really sorry.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
N-no, it was my fault to begin with! Besides, today was our first day.
I'm sure tomorrow will go better now that we have this experience.
Okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: In that moment, why didn't I stop her?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(We should think things through before trying anything so
dangerous... Oh, right, but we only have a few minutes, don't we?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(It's Taiki, I'm sure she'll be fine. She wouldn't run out of time and fall
into the river...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (If I'd stopped her, I could've prevented her from falling in.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I'm always doing this. Every time I have something to say, I freeze,
and I let Taiki take the lead for me.)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Maybe... it's for the Summer Walk?! Wow, I wanna try it! Let's go
together!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, would you mind if we joined you on your treasure hunt? We'll
have fun together! It'll be exciting!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(For once, I wanted to be the one leading her along, but I've failed
miserably...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Not only that, but by holding myself back, I put her in danger!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (...What am I doing with myself?)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hrng... Where did my mask go? How could it just disappear while I
left it hanging up?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-waaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(She ran away... It's rare to see her without her mask. She must've lost
it.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait, it's stuck over there.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The strongest, the fastest, the Phantom Bird! El Condor Pasa is in the
ring! Thank you for finding my mask!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It perked you up quick.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This mask and I are inseparable! I would even go as far as to say the
mask completes me! But anyway, I need you to promise me something.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: P-please don't tell anyone that I'm weak without my mask!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Are you? I think you're strong with or without it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You can multiply zero by anything and it'll still be zero. If you were
really weak, a mask wouldn't do anything for you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Dober, is there something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: N-not really...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There must be! I can see it on your face! And it's not fair for only one
of us to reveal a secret!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-it's really nothing. I guess I was just feeling a bit insecure. Or maybe
I expected too much of myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I start out eager, but then I overthink things, and in the end I can't do
anything. Ugh, this is awkward. Forget all of that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You can't do anything? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Do you remember when we first ran into each other at the campsite?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So, anyway, um... I-if it's all right with you both, um...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You changed the subject for my sake, didn't you? When you get that
serious look on your face, it means you're thinking hard about things.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed. People like you are reliable 'cause you're always so
thoughtful!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: N-no, that's not...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
"Although you're reserved, you're observant and thoughtful. You may
not realize it, but that makes you someone people can rely on."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If it's true what you said, that I already have strength in me and the
mask only helps draw more of it out...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then I can say the same for you too! You have a gajillion little sparks
inside you, as many as the starry sky!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So here's a present for you! A special mask that only you and I can
see!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whenever you wear this mask, those twinkling sparks of light will all
ignite one after another! You'll transform into the cool and reliable
Dober that I know!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And you know it's true, 'cause I said so!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Really? Okay, thank you. I'll give it a try.
